rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Reconsideration Ruling Of 10-06-2015 Plaintiffs' Opposition To Defendants' Motions To Strike And To Demurrer And To Continue With Pre-Filed Jury Trial

PLAINTIFF HERO CHIANG, JANEVA CHIANG Motion For Reconsideration Ruling Of 10-06-2015 Plaintiffs' Opposition To Defendants' Motions To Strike And To Demurrer And To Continue With Pre-Filed Jury Trial is continued to November 23, 2015 to be heard with other pending motions. rulings.Case Title: SUCCESSOR AGENCY TO THE REDEVELOPMENT AGENCY OF TH ET AL VS. ALL PERSONS CLAIMING ANY INTEREST IN OR LIEN UPON
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Or Tax Costs Claimed By Plaintiffs
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Wednesday, November 18, 2015, Line 2. DEFENDANT JOHN LEBOLT, RICHARD LEBOLT Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Or Tax Costs Claimed By Plaintiffs is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion to tax costs is granted in part and the costs are taxed as follows: (1) Category 5 in the amount of $7,000; and (2) Category 12 in the amount of $232.50. Motion in otherwise denied. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NORMA ANN MULLIGAN VS. LIVERPOOL LIL'S INC.
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Strike Portions Of First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Wednesday, November 18, 2015, Line 3. DEFENDANT LIVERPOOL LIL'S INC., GILBERT HODGES Notice Of Motion To Strike Portions Of First Amended Complaint Complaint is DENIED. Request for punitive damages is sufficiently alleged. Paragraph 21 is not irrelevant or improper. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Strike Plaintiffs Claims For Punitive Damages And Attorneys Fees In Plaintiffs Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Wednesday, November 18, 2015, Line 5 (Part 2 of 2). DEFENDANT YOUNG NA Notice Of Motion To Strike Plaintiffs Claims For Punitive Damages And Attorneys Fees In Plaintiffs Amended Complaint is DENIED. =(501/REQ)

Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Wednesday, November 18, 2015, Line 5 (Part 1 of 2). DEFENDANT YOUNG NA DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Complaint is sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer is overruled as to 1-11 causes of action; Plaintiff sufficiently alleges each element of these causes of action. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to Govt. Code 12940 violation for Plaintiff to allege a cause of action under Govt. Code 12955 (Opposition 11:10-14). =(501/REQ)
